name: climbing-mount-improbable
description: Richard Dawkins' masterful explanation of how natural selection builds complex biological structures — eyes, wings, spider silk, shells — through cumulative, gradual evolution.
useCase: Understand how natural selection creates apparent design in nature through the Mount Improbable metaphor of cumulative selection.
knownRisks: Assumes acceptance of evolution as scientific fact
Dawkins' polemical style may alienate some readers
Some concepts require basic biology understanding
